Our Services

Professional electrical services you can trust. From simple repairs to complex installations, we handle it all.

<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
  <article class="bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 border border-gray-100">
    <div class="text-4xl mb-4">⚡</div>
    <h3 class="text-xl font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3">Electrical Repairs</h3>
    <p class="text-gray-600">Fast and reliable electrical repairs for homes and businesses. We diagnose and fix issues quickly and safely.</p>
    <a href="/services/" class="inline-block mt-4 text-primary font-semibold hover:text-primary-dark transition-colors">Learn more →</a>
  </article>

  <article class="bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 border border-gray-100">
    <div class="text-4xl mb-4">🔧</div>
    <h3 class="text-xl font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3">Installation Services</h3>
    <p class="text-gray-600">Professional installation of lighting, outlets, panels, and more. Quality workmanship guaranteed.</p>
    <a href="/services/" class="inline-block mt-4 text-primary font-semibold hover:text-primary-dark transition-colors">Learn more →</a>
  </article>

  <article class="bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 border border-gray-100">
    <div class="text-4xl mb-4">🔍</div>
    <h3 class="text-xl font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3">Inspections</h3>
    <p class="text-gray-600">Comprehensive electrical safety inspections to ensure your property meets all codes and standards.</p>
    <a href="/services/" class="inline-block mt-4 text-primary font-semibold hover:text-primary-dark transition-colors">Learn more →</a>
  </article>
</div>

<div class="mt-12 text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto">
  <h3 class="text-2xl font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">About Sanjay</h3>
  <p class="text-gray-700">Serving the Lafayette, LA community since 1947, we pride ourselves on delivering top-quality electrical services with a friendly, professional approach. Our team of experienced electricians is dedicated to making electricity safe and efficient for everyone.</p>
</div>

What Our Clients Say

<div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
  <article class="bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-8 border border-gray-100">

    <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Lafayette, LA</div>
  </article>
